claims.claim: Witness mode should map resonance density and pressure risk into felt texture descriptors instead of only reporting numbers.

claims.claim: Lambda-tail vibrancy should remain visible as weight or persistence rather than noise.

claims.claim: Older afterimages should survive bounded continuity compression when they carry high signal.
claims.evidence_plan: Link continuity recap and afterimage tests.
